title: Student Care Centre Manager (Location: Serangoon)
description:
Job Title

Student Care Centre Manager (Location: Serangoon)

Occupation

SUPERVISOR

Job Description & Requirements

Job Description

  • Develop love, care and trust among yourself, children and parents.
  • Treating with love every child fairly and equally.
  • Ensure the safety of children at ALL TIMES.
  • Develop the positive character and behaviour among children and assist their holistic
  • development.
  • Managing a class in the centre where necessary.
  • Ensure that the programme continues to meet children’s needs and follow the
  • curriculum as necessary.
  • Responsible for the production of class materials and lesson plans
  • Ensure that the programme time table and lesson plans are followed closely.
  • Conduct relief classes during the absence of teachers.
  • Manage a team of teachers at your designated centre; manage annual leave matters,
  • disciplinary issues and work performance, keep teachers motivated, visit classrooms
  • to evaluate teaching methods and provide performance standards for teachers and
  • other employees.
  • Responsible for all administrative matters of the centre which includes and not limited
  • to subsidy applications, students’ registration, consolidating reports of teachers and
  • students.
  • Monitor students’ progress and establish positive relationships with all parents of
  • students.
  • Provide counselling for students with behavioral and disciplinary issues.
  • Establish positive relationships with teachers and staff of the centre.
  • Prepare weekly and monthly reports for the management of Kowabunga! as well as
  • other stakeholders.
  • In charge of yearly events and activities of the centre. Ensure that they meet the
  • requirements and safety of the programme, as well as coordinated and conducted in
  • an effective manner.
  • Responsible for the overall cleanliness and hygiene of the centre.
  • Prepare proposals for the management for business enhancement.
  • Attend meetings with other education officers and network with respective business
  • organizations.
  • Ensure all necessary texts, teaching materials, software and licenses are produced,
  • procured, catalogued and securely maintained with the company logo/template.
  • Assist in promoting and marketing of all programmes and events
  • Any other duties/responsibilities as assigned

Job Requirements

  • Candidate must possess minimally Diploma. (Candidates without a diploma but with relevant experience may apply).
  • At least 2 year(s) of working experience in the student care/education industry is required.
  • Dedicated, reliable, creative, disciplined.
  • Efficient multi tasking skills.
  • Effective communications and classroom management skills.
  • Able to start immediately.
  • Singaporeans/PR preferred.
  • With experience preferred

postedCompany.description:
Kowabunga! is the leading Capacity Developer,
Empowering Organisations’ Impact in Sustainability.

We aim to serve as the catalyst and capability builder for the sustainability 

ecosystem, enhancing enterprises' triple bottom line impact - People, Planet and Performance.

At Kowabunga!, our journey has evolved, but our commitment to making a positive impact remains steadfast. We’ve always believed in the power of education to shape responsible and environmentally conscious citizens. Over the years, we’ve had the privilege of inspiring children and youth to become the change-makers our world needs.


Join us on this journey, and let’s work together to create a more sustainable and resilient future for all. Through collaboration, innovation, and a shared commitment to sustainability, we believe we can make a world of difference, one company at a time. Feel free to be as crafty and imaginative as possible when applying as we encourage creativity (even in our application process).
postedCompany.name: KOWABUNGA! GLOBAL PTE. LTD.
